name: Straight Tone → Vibrato
pedagogy: Hold one steady pitch with a straight (vibrato-free) tone for the first half, then release into an even, natural vibrato (~5–7 pulses per second, about a semitone wide) for the second half. Trains conscious control over vibrato onset. Plays as a follow-along: the app guides the target pitch but can't grade your vibrato rate or evenness — that's by ear.
